history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A close-up, slightly blurry, medium shot of a young person wearing black-rimmed square glasses and a black t-shirt with a large, bold yellow and orange graphic design on it. The person has dark, neatly styled hair with bangs that fall over their forehead. Their skin tone is light. The glasses have thick frames and tinted lenses, and they are positioned slightly askew on the person's face. The person is looking slightly to the right, with their mouth slightly ajar, revealing a hint of their lips. The background is dark and out of focus, with faint vertical lines suggesting a window or blinds in the distance, illuminated by soft, ambient light. The overall lighting is dim, with a warm cast, creating a moody and intimate atmosphere. The focus is on the person's face and upper body, with the rest of the image softly blurred, drawing attention to the details of their features and attire. The style is casual and contemporary, with a hint of a selfie aesthetic due to the close-up framing and slight blur. The color palette is dominated by dark tones of black and gray, contrasted by the warm yellow and orange of the t-shirt graphic and the warm tint of the glasses.
